message:
feat(mvcc): D3 CommitSequenceCombiner for batched commit sequence allocation

Implements flat combining (Hendler et al., SPAA 2010) for commit sequence
allocation to reduce cache-line bouncing under high thread contention.

Architecture:
- 64 cache-line-aligned slots (64 bytes each, #[repr(align(64))])
- Per-thread handles via register() -> CommitCombineHandle
- Single combiner does batched fetch_add(N) instead of N separate fetch_add(1)
- Non-combiners spin-wait on their slot (typically <1µs)

Expected improvement:
- Before: 8 threads × 1000 commits = 8000 cache-line bounces
- After:  ~500 batched operations = ~500 cache-line bounces

Tests (6 passing):
- test_combiner_single_thread: basic sequential allocation
- test_combiner_8t_all_commits_succeed: 8 threads, 100 commits each
- test_combiner_16t_throughput: 16 threads, 1000 commits each
- test_combiner_cache_line_padding: verify 64-byte alignment
- test_combiner_batch_size_varies: 1, 4, 8 concurrent commits
- test_combiner_fairness: no thread starvation under contention

Bead: bd-3wop3.3 (infrastructure complete, wiring into commit path TBD)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
